name: Emanation (Love)
scaffolding_intent: Emits heart particles around the entity

parameters.name: tint
parameters.description: RGB tint shift applied to entity pixels (additive)

parameters.name: tintSaturation
parameters.description: How strongly the tint is applied (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint)

correction_intent: Child described the wrong emotion — the character actually feels LOVE, AFFECTION, or TENDERNESS toward someone or something (e.g. said 'grumpy' or 'bored' when the character is smiling lovingly).
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed that a character feels love, affection, or tenderness
